forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d880
+project: spatial-nav
+title: 'Spatial nav review cleanup: PartialEq/Default derives, stale test name, ref shadowing'
+---
+## What
+
+Four unresolved review nits were left on the closed spatial-nav cards. Rolling them up into a single cleanup task.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `PartialEq` on `SpatialEntry`. Simplifies test assertions; free since `Rect` already derives it and other fields are `String`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. A zero-origin zero-size rect is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology after `spatial_pop_layer` → `spatial_remove_layer` rename. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
+- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local variable `ref` shadows the JSX reserved word. Rename to `keyRef` for clarity. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Both derives compile and are used by at least one existing test site
+- [ ] Test function renamed; all references updated
+- [ ] `ref` local renamed with no behavior change
+- [ ] `cargo test` passes, `pnpm vitest run` passes
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

Four unresolved review nits were left on the closed spatial-nav cards. Rolling them up into a single cleanup task.

### Subtasks

- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `PartialEq` on `SpatialEntry`. Simplifies test assertions; free since `Rect` already derives it and other fields are `String`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. A zero-origin zero-size rect is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology after `spatial_pop_layer` → `spatial_remove_layer` rename. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local variable `ref` shadows the JSX reserved word. Rename to `keyRef` for clarity. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Both derives compile and are used by at least one existing test site
- [ ] Test function renamed; all references updated
- [ ] `ref` local renamed with no behavior change
- [ ] `cargo test` passes, `pnpm vitest run` passes
Spatial nav review cleanup: PartialEq/Default derives, stale test name, ref shadowing

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -8,18 +8,26 @@
 ---
 ## What

-Four unresolved review nits were left on the closed spatial-nav cards. Rolling them up into a single cleanup task.
+Unresolved review nits plus newly identified Rust test gaps in the spatial nav state machine.
+
+### Subtasks — style nits
+
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `PartialEq` on `SpatialEntry`. Simplifies test assertions; free since `Rect` already derives it. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. Zero-origin zero-size is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
+- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local `ref` shadows the JSX keyword. Rename to `keyRef`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)

-### Subtasks
+### Subtasks — Rust test coverage gaps

-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `PartialEq` on `SpatialEntry`. Simplifies test assertions; free since `Rect` already derives it and other fields are `String`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. A zero-origin zero-size rect is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology after `spatial_pop_layer` → `spatial_remove_layer` rename. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
-- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local variable `ref` shadows the JSX reserved word. Rename to `keyRef` for clarity. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `navigate()` with `overrides` — three cases in one test: `Some("target")` redirects, `None` blocks (returns no event), missing key falls through to beam test. Each case asserted independently.
+- [ ] Layer-filter exclusion — register an entry on layer A, push layer B, navigate from an entry on layer B, confirm the layer-A entry is never a candidate.
+- [ ] Cross-layer focus memory — with layers A and B both stacked, focus an entry on A, switch focus to an entry on B (not via layer push), confirm `last_focused` is written to layer A (the outgoing layer), not layer B.
+- [ ] `unregister_batch` includes the focused key — confirm `focus-changed` emits exactly once with `next_key: null`.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] Both derives compile and are used by at least one existing test site
-- [ ] Test function renamed; all references updated
+- [ ] Both derives compile and simplify at least one existing test assertion
+- [ ] Test rename complete; no "pop" terminology remains in spatial state tests
 - [ ] `ref` local renamed with no behavior change
+- [ ] Four new Rust tests added and passing
 - [ ] `cargo test` passes, `pnpm vitest run` passes
\ No newline at end of file

-Unresolved review nits plus newly identified Rust test gaps in the spatial nav state machine.

-### Subtasks — style nits
+### Subtasks

-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `PartialEq` on `SpatialEntry`. Simplifies test assertions; free since `Rect` already derives it. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. Zero-origin zero-size is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
-- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local `ref` shadows the JSX keyword. Rename to `keyRef`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `PartialEq` on `SpatialEntry`. Simplifies test assertions; free since `Rect` already derives it and other fields are `String`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. A zero-origin zero-size rect is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology after `spatial_pop_layer` → `spatial_remove_layer` rename. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
+- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local variable `ref` shadows the JSX reserved word. Rename to `keyRef` for clarity. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)

-### Subtasks — Rust test coverage gaps
-
-- [ ] `navigate()` with `overrides` — three cases in one test: `Some("target")` redirects, `None` blocks (returns no event), missing key falls through to beam test. Each case asserted independently.
-- [ ] Layer-filter exclusion — register an entry on layer A, push layer B, navigate from an entry on layer B, confirm the layer-A entry is never a candidate.
-- [ ] Cross-layer focus memory — with layers A and B both stacked, focus an entry on A, switch focus to an entry on B (not via layer push), confirm `last_focused` is written to layer A (the outgoing layer), not layer B.
-- [ ] `unregister_batch` includes the focused key — confirm `focus-changed` emits exactly once with `next_key: null`.
-
 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] Both derives compile and simplify at least one existing test assertion
-- [ ] Test rename complete; no "pop" terminology remains in spatial state tests
+- [ ] Both derives compile and are used by at least one existing test site
+- [ ] Test function renamed; all references updated
 - [ ] `ref` local renamed with no behavior change
-- [ ] Four new Rust tests added and passing
 - [ ] `cargo test` passes, `pnpm vitest run` passes
\ No newline at end of file

-- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local `ref` shadows the JSX keyword. Rename to `keyRef`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)

+- [x] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — derive `Default` on `Rect`. Zero-origin zero-size is a natural default. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)
+- [x] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
+- [x] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local `ref` shadows the JSX keyword. Rename to `keyRef`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)

 ### Subtasks — Rust test coverage gaps

-- [ ] `navigate()` with `overrides` — three cases in one test: `Some("target")` redirects, `None` blocks (returns no event), missing key falls through to beam test. Each case asserted independently.
-- [ ] Layer-filter exclusion — register an entry on layer A, push layer B, navigate from an entry on layer B, confirm the layer-A entry is never a candidate.
-- [ ] Cross-layer focus memory — with layers A and B both stacked, focus an entry on A, switch focus to an entry on B (not via layer push), confirm `last_focused` is written to layer A (the outgoing layer), not layer B.
-- [ ] `unregister_batch` includes the focused key — confirm `focus-changed` emits exactly once with `next_key: null`.
+- [x] `navigate()` with `overrides` — three cases in one test: `Some("target")` redirects, `None` blocks (returns no event), missing key falls through to beam test. Each case asserted independently.
+- [x] Layer-filter exclusion — register an entry on layer A, push layer B, navigate from an entry on layer B, confirm the layer-A entry is never a candidate.
+- [x] Cross-layer focus memory — with layers A and B both stacked, focus an entry on A, switch focus to an entry on B (not via layer push), confirm `last_focused` is written to layer A (the outgoing layer), not layer B.
+- [x] `unregister_batch` includes the focused key — confirm `focus-changed` emits exactly once with `next_key: null`.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] Both derives compile and simplify at least one existing test assertion
-- [ ] Test rename complete; no "pop" terminology remains in spatial state tests
-- [ ] `ref` local renamed with no behavior change
-- [ ] Four new Rust tests added and passing
-- [ ] `cargo test` passes, `pnpm vitest run` passes
\ No newline at end of file
+- [x] Both derives compile and simplify at least one existing test assertion
+- [x] Test rename complete; no "pop" terminology remains in spatial state tests
+- [x] `ref` local renamed with no behavior change
+- [x] Four new Rust tests added and passing
+- [x] `cargo test` passes, `pnpm vitest run` passes
+
+## Implementation Notes
+
+- Added `PartialEq` derive to `SpatialEntry` and `Default` to `Rect` in `spatial_state.rs`.
+- Simplified `update_rect_changes_rect_only` to compare the whole `Rect` with `PartialEq` instead of asserting each of x/y/width/height independently.
+- Added a new `rect_default_is_zero_origin_zero_size` test demonstrating the `Default` derive.
+- Test was already named `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`; only a stale "Pop" comment inside its body remained — updated to "Remove".
+- Renamed `ref` to `keyRef` in `useLayerKey()` in `focus-layer.tsx`.
+- Added four new tests: `navigate_override_redirect_block_and_fallthrough`, `navigate_layer_filter_excludes_inactive_layer_entries`, `focus_across_layers_writes_last_focused_to_outgoing_layer`, `unregister_batch_with_focused_key_emits_focus_changed_once`.
+- Verified: 225 `swissarmyhammer-commands` tests pass, 1115 vitest tests pass, workspace builds clean.
\ No newline at end of file

+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/spatial_state.rs` — rename test `layer_pop_restores_last_focused` → `layer_remove_restores_last_focused`. Stale "pop" terminology. (from card 01KNQXXF5W7G4JP73C6ZCMKYKX)
+- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/focus-layer.tsx:13` — local `ref` shadows the JSX keyword. Rename to `keyRef`. (from card 01KNQXW7HHHB8HW76K3PXH3G34)

 ### Subtasks — Rust test coverage gaps

-- [x] `navigate()` with `overrides` — three cases in one test: `Some("target")` redirects, `None` blocks (returns no event), missing key falls through to beam test. Each case asserted independently.
-- [x] Layer-filter exclusion — register an entry on layer A, push layer B, navigate from an entry on layer B, confirm the layer-A entry is never a candidate.
-- [x] Cross-layer focus memory — with layers A and B both stacked, focus an entry on A, switch focus to an entry on B (not via layer push), confirm `last_focused` is written to layer A (the outgoing layer), not layer B.
-- [x] `unregister_batch` includes the focused key — confirm `focus-changed` emits exactly once with `next_key: null`.
+- [ ] `navigate()` with `overrides` — three cases in one test: `Some("target")` redirects, `None` blocks (returns no event), missing key falls through to beam test. Each case asserted independently.
+- [ ] Layer-filter exclusion — register an entry on layer A, push layer B, navigate from an entry on layer B, confirm the layer-A entry is never a candidate.
+- [ ] Cross-layer focus memory — with layers A and B both stacked, focus an entry on A, switch focus to an entry on B (not via layer push), confirm `last_focused` is written to layer A (the outgoing layer), not layer B.
+- [ ] `unregister_batch` includes the focused key — confirm `focus-changed` emits exactly once with `next_key: null`.
